column24: As a Veteran, you are NOT required to attend a tryout, though your attendance helps train the next generation. The rain makeup date in case of bad weather is June 10th from 10am-12:30pm.
column25: You are needed a minimum 3 of the first 4 days. If you need to miss more than 1 day, expect to have a day of eligibility removed from the end the tournament.

column27: Last year, we struggled for numbers at the start of weekdays, so we're asking veterans to commit to showing up for match start for at least 1 of Monday or Tuesday and at least 1 of Wednesday or Thursday.
